{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Deadly Poison||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Poison|2}}
{{C|Deadly Poison||2}} is a 1 {{Icon|SE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common&color:Silent|Common|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill&color:Silent|Skill|2}} Card for the {{KW|Silent||2}}.
== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*{{BD|Poison||2}} applied by this card:
**Fulfills {{C|Bubble Bubble||2}}'s conditions to apply {{BD|Poison||2}}.
**Increases {{KW|Block||2}} granted by {{C|Mirage||2}}.
**Potentially triggers {{C|Outbreak||2}}, dealing 11 (15) damage to ALL enemies.
**Is increased by 1 by {{R|Snecko Skull||2}}.
**Compounds with all other sources for {{BD|Poison||2}}.
**Wakes up any enemies that are {{BD|Asleep||2}}.
**Deals just 1 damage if {{BD|Intangible||2}} is present.
** Is potentially doubled by {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}}.
== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Deadly Poison to the game.
